data.content:
martinbaud

Software craftsman · Retro game archaeologist

### Aery Portal Gateway to AeryFlux & AerySandBox
---

## AeryFlux (Current/Further Focus) AI-powered geospatial platform with interactive 3D globe experiences. | Project | Description | Links | |---------|-------------|-------| | **Lumos** | Landing page | [aeryflux.com](https://aeryflux.com) · [repo](https://github.com/aeryflux/lumos) | | **Haki** | Learn-to-code platform | [haki.aeryflux.com](https://haki.aeryflux.com) · [repo](https://github.com/aeryflux/haki) | | **@aeryflux/globe** | 3D globe for React/RN | [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aeryflux/globe) · [demo](https://aeryflux.github.io/globe-demo) | | **@aeryflux/xenova-bridge** | NL interface bridge | [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aeryflux/xenova-bridge) | | **Docs** | Public documentation | [aery-docs](https://github.com/aeryflux/aery-docs) | TypeScript · Three.js · React · Transformers.js ---

## AerySandBox

Open gaming console — core system complete.

Hybrid VPS/Railway architecture with Discord bot managing TCP/UDP inbound connections.

| Project | Description | Status |
|---------|-------------|--------|
| [aof6_server](https://github.com/martinbaud/aof6_server) | Minecraft All of Fabric 6 | 🟢 Railway |
| [palworld-server-docker](https://github.com/martinbaud/palworld-server-docker) | Palworld dedicated server | 🟢 Hetzner |
| [EnhancedSC](https://github.com/martinbaud/EnhancedSC) | Splinter Cell 2P Coop mod | 🟡 Experimental / WIP |

### Research
